mapper.select: SELECT * FROM tb_risk_activity_process WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} ORDER BY major_category_idx ASC, id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_activity_process WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND major_category_idx = #{majorCategoryIdx} ORDER BY id ASC
SELECT * FROM tb_risk_activity_process WHERE risk_id = #{riskId} AND is_target = 1 ORDER BY major_category_idx ASC, id ASC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tb_risk_activity_process ( risk_id, major_category_idx, major_category, detail_action, evaluation_date, evaluator, is_target, created_at ) VALUES ( #{riskId}, #{majorCategoryIdx}, #{majorCategory}, #{detailAction}, #{evaluationDate}, #{evaluator}, #{isTarget}, GETDATE() )
mapper.update: UPDATE tb_risk_activity_process SET major_category_idx = #{majorCategoryIdx}, major_category = #{majorCategory}, detail_action = #{detailAction}, evaluation_date = #{evaluationDate}, evaluator = #{evaluator}, is_target = #{isTarget} WHERE id = #{id}
